历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28233 → 31882 → 33781 → 35668 → 36654, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8421 places; the 2025 baseline is about 36654 places, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4872 places in the last 3 years, and the backward shift speed is accelerating; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 32 people from 2021 to 2023, increased to 47 people in 2024, and to 50 people in 2025; the 2026 plan is 60 people, an increase of 20% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a mitigating effect on competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 3.59% increase in Physics Category candidates in this province, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, but the historical backward shift trend is strong; based on the 2025 baseline of 36654 places, the estimated minimum ranking is about 41103 places, with a range of 40600–41600 places.
